name: Villatobas, Lillo and La Guardia – circular from Dosbarrios
name_original: Villatobas, Lillo y La Guardia – circular desde Dosbarrios
region_intro: Road cycling routes around Dosbarrios are situated within the Mesa de Ocaña, an elevated plain in the northeast of Toledo, Spain. This region is characterized by expansive, open, and predominantly flat agricultural landscapes, featuring vast fields of cereal, vineyards, and olive groves. The terrain offers smooth riding conditions, allowing cyclists to cover distances efficiently across cultivated fields and gentle undulations. Best road cycling routes around Dosbarrios The most popular road cycling route is Yepes y Huerta de Valdecarabanos – circular from Ocaña, a 30.3 miles (48.7 km) trail that takes 1 hour 58 minutes to complete. This route offers views of the agricultural landscape. Another top favourite among local road cyclists is Villatobas, Lillo and La Guardia – circular from Dosbarrios, a moderate 46.9 miles (75.5 km) path. This path traverses the open plains of the Mesa de Ocaña. Local road cyclists also love the Ocaña, Aranjuez and Yepes, a 43.8 miles (70.4 km) trail leading through cultivated fields and traditional towns, often completed in about 4 hours 28 minutes. Road cycling around Dosbarrios is defined by the open plains of the Mesa de Ocaña, cultivated fields, and traditional towns. The network offers options for various ability levels, including easy, moderate, and challenging routes. The routes in Dosbarrios are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.5 stars from more than 3 reviews. More than 200 road cyclists have used komoot to explore Dosbarrios's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many road cycling routes are available around Dosbarrios?
A: There are nearly 20 road cycling routes around Dosbarrios, offering a variety of options for different skill levels. The komoot community has explored these routes over 200 times.

Q: What is the typical terrain like for road cycling in Dosbarrios?
A: The terrain around Dosbarrios is primarily characterized by the &lt;strong&gt;Mesa de Ocaña&lt;/strong&gt;, an elevated plain known for its expansive, open, and predominantly flat agricultural landscapes. You'll cycle through vast fields of cereal, vineyards, and olive groves, providing smooth riding conditions and picturesque backdrops.

Q: What are the elevation gains like on road cycling routes in Dosbarrios?
A: While the region is generally flat, routes do feature gentle undulations. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1023108503/villatobas-lillo-and-la-guardia-circular-from-dosbarrios" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Villatobas, Lillo and La Guardia – circular from Dosbarrios&lt;/a&gt; route has an elevation gain of approximately 374 meters, offering a moderate challenge while still enjoying the open plains.

Q: Are there road cycling routes suitable for beginners in Dosbarrios?
A: Yes, there are routes suitable for beginners. For instance, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1025395667/yepes-y-huerta-de-valdecarabanos-circular-from-ocana" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Yepes y Huerta de Valdecarabanos – circular from Ocaña&lt;/a&gt; is classified as an easy route, perfect for those new to road cycling or looking for a relaxed ride.

Q: Can I find challenging road cycling routes around Dosbarrios?
A: Yes, for more experienced cyclists, there are a couple of challenging routes available. These routes will offer greater distances and elevation changes compared to the easier options, providing a more demanding ride across the region's varied landscape.

Q: What landmarks or points of interest can I see along road cycling routes in Dosbarrios?
A: While cycling, you can encounter traditional towns and historical sites. Notable attractions include the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/6313232" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Church of Nuestra Señora de la Asunción (Tembleque)&lt;/a&gt;, the charming town of &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5431553" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;La Guardia&lt;/a&gt;, and the historic &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/6269418" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Casa de las Torres&lt;/a&gt;. Many routes also pass through traditional towns like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5431577" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Villatobas&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Are there any natural features to explore while cycling in Dosbarrios?
A: Beyond the extensive cultivated fields of cereal, vineyards, and olive groves, the area features broken terrain with ravines and gullies that channel streams towards the Tagus River. The 'Paseo del Agua' (Water Walk) highlights the abundance of springs in valleys like Valdecarábanos and Cardancho, contributing to the natural beauty you might encounter.

Q: What is the best time of year for road cycling in Dosbarrios?
A: Dosbarrios benefits from a pleasant Mediterranean climate with numerous sunny days, making it appealing for outdoor activities like cycling for much of the year. Spring and autumn generally offer the most comfortable temperatures for longer rides.

Q: Are there circular road cycling routes in Dosbarrios?
A: Yes, many of the road cycling routes around Dosbarrios are circular, allowing you to start and end your ride in the same location. Examples include the popular &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1025395667/yepes-y-huerta-de-valdecarabanos-circular-from-ocana" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Yepes y Huerta de Valdecarabanos – circular from Ocaña&lt;/a&gt; and &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1023108503/villatobas-lillo-and-la-guardia-circular-from-dosbarrios" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Villatobas, Lillo and La Guardia – circular from Dosbarrios&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: What do other road cyclists enjoy the most about road cycling in Dosbarrios?
A: The area is highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.5 stars. Cyclists often praise the smooth riding conditions, the expansive and tranquil agricultural landscapes, and the variety of routes that cater to different abilities.

Q: How long do road cycling routes typically take in Dosbarrios?
A: Route durations vary depending on length and your pace. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1025395667/yepes-y-huerta-de-valdecarabanos-circular-from-ocana" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Yepes y Huerta de Valdecarabanos – circular from Ocaña&lt;/a&gt; takes about 1 hour 58 minutes, while the longer &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1025349836/ocana-aranjuez-and-yepes" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ocaña, Aranjuez and Yepes&lt;/a&gt; route can take around 4 hours 28 minutes.
tips:
Villatobas is a municipality with a rich history that dates back to ancient times. Archaeological studies indicate that the area was inhabited from the 4th or 3rd century BC by various peoples. The first written record of Villatobas appears in the charter of Montealegre in 1219, where it is mentioned as "Villa de Tobas"
Villatobas was also the scene of important events during the War of Independence in the 19th century. Over the centuries, it has managed to preserve its historical heritage, including its parish church dedicated to San Juan Bautista and the ruins of its 13th-century castle.

Lillo is located in a fairly low area that has several lagoons, the largest being the Lillo lagoon just to the south of the town. In the town there is an old convent that has been converted into a hotel-restaurant and is a pleasant place to stop.

La Guardia is considered a small town, but surprisingly rich in heritage, ideal for a peaceful getaway from Madrid or Toledo. Its hilltop location affords panoramic views, streets steeped in history, and a distinctive character. Although it seems like a town you could visit in a morning, it holds more history, architecture, and scenery than meets the eye.

Furthermore, it's part of a renowned wine-producing region: within its boundaries lies the Pago Campo de La Guardia vineyard, a wine with a protected designation of origin, adding value for wine tourism enthusiasts.
